message:
feat: enrich gt convoy list --json with tracked issues and completion counts

The --json flag existed but only output basic convoy metadata (id, title,
status, created_at). For scripted convoy management (bulk close, status
checks, etc.), consumers need tracked issues and completion progress.

Now includes tracked issues array with per-issue status, plus completed/total
counts for each convoy. This enables piping to jq/python for automation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
